title: Critical PVP
description: ⚔ PvP Texture Pack with Bow Charger, Low Fire, Side Shield, Short Swords, Small Totems, Totem Highlighter and no Pumpkin Blur!
body:
## ⚔ PvP Texture Pack

A clean and competitive PvP texture pack designed for maximum clarity and performance.  
Features include:

- **Bow Charger** – See immediately when you can shoot. 
- **Low Fire** – Flames no longer block your vision.  
- **Low Side Shield** – Shield moved to the side for better visibility.  
- **Short Swords** – Compact sword models for smoother gameplay.  
- **Small Totems** – Clear view with Totems in Off-Hand and on Totempop.
- **Totem Highlighter** – View faster your Totems in your Inventory.
- **No Pumpkin Blur** – Clear view even with a pumpkin equipped. 

**Soft Dependency**: [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Optional if you don't want the Red Box in your Off-Hand.

Perfect for duels, UHC, Bedwars, or casual PvP – fight with confidence, speed, and style!
